title: The Ultimate Create Pack
description: A modpack of my favorite Create Addons along with a few other mods.
body:
# A _modpack_ full of my **favorite** **Create Addons**!

This modpack includes: Create, Create Fabric, and a few other Create Addons along with some other mods unrelated to Create. This modpack does not only have Forge Create, but also the Fabric version! Meaning you can play Create on both _Forge_ and _Fabric_ **(Most popular mod loaders)**! Thanks to all the creators of the Create Addons and Create mods, and all other mod creators for making Minecraft awesome. This modpack meerly just gets some of the ones that I enjoy and puts them all together.


<details>
<summary>Latest Fabric Version Mod List:</summary>

[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium/version/1.0.36+mc1.20.1)

[Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles/version/0.4.5-mc1.20.1-fabric)

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/version/mc1.20.1-0.11.3-fabric)
